title: Firecrawl offer-content extraction schema
description: Extraction-time target schema handed to Firecrawl's formats=[{"type":"json","schema":...}] scrape call (SEARCH-08). Derived from offer_spec.schema.json#/$defs/offer_content, but intentionally LOOSER: no `required` array and no `additionalProperties: false`, so Firecrawl's LLM-backed extraction can report a genuinely-absent field as absent instead of being forced to invent a value to satisfy a strict schema (RESEARCH.md Pitfall 3). gmj_freeze_offer.py's validate_content() remains the strict freeze-time gate against the full offer_content $def and is unchanged by this schema.
